title: CHIKVnext: Molecular epidemiology of Chikungunya virus
author: Michael T Wolfinger
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: CHIKVnext is an interactive resource to study the evolution and global spread of Chikungunya virus (CHIKV), built on the Nextstrain platform.
steps_raw: CHIKVnext is an interactive resource to study the evolution and global spread of Chikungunya virus (CHIKV), built on the Nextstrain platform.
